title: Vault Boy Fallout Totem
description: replaces the classic Totem of Immortality with a custom version of the legendary Vault Boy Fallout skin. Survive in style and strike fear into your enemies!
body:
Unleash the dark power of Vault Boy Fallout! This texture pack for Minecraft replaces the classic Totem of Immortality with a custom version of the legendary Vault Boy Fallout skin. Survive in style and strike fear into your enemies!
![Vault Boy Fallout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4253eaf1377933506efe679afa11ec9d7aa64511_0.webp)

Spanish (Español)

¡Desata el poder oscuro de Vault Boy Fallout! Este texture pack para Minecraft Bedrock reemplaza el clasico totem de inmortalidad con una version personalizada de la legendaria skin de Vault Boy Fallout. ¡Sobrevive con estilo y siembra el miedo en tus enemigos!
